violations.text: Dishwasher is not in good repair and is not currently being used. Employees have been using paper trays and sending all serving utensils/cookware to the high school for proper washing, rinsing, and sanitizing. Dishwasher must be serviced and remain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
Milk chest cooler is not in good repair. Leak observed and ice build-up. Chest cooler is to be serviced and repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Test strips or internal temperature indicator must be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

Hot-holding units were observed in poor repair in the service line area. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. Establishment is using a hot box to hold hot food. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2025

Food items were observed out for self service not behind a sneeze guard. Food items were removed before customers came through the service line and replaced with cupped and lidded items. Food items for self service but be protected by a sneeze guard or must be packaged. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
